GenAiFunction.description: Look up Doctor (Person Account), Facility (Business Account), or open Tasks linked to a Doctor's Account. Pass searchName for name-based lookups (Doctor, Facility) and searchId for Id-based lookups (OpenTasks). Returns up to 5 matches for name lookups, 3 most recent for OpenTasks. Returns NotFound when zero matches, TooMany when more than 5 name matches, Success otherwise.
